TRIVENI GAVATHE Junior Backend Developer | Python | Django | MySQL
 +91-8446405020    triveni.r.gavathe.work@gmail.com    linkedin.com/in/triveni-gavathe    github.com/triveni-gavathe   
 Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
 
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Results-driven Python Developer with hands-on experience in CNN-based deep learning models, Django web applications, and
data preprocessing pipelines. 2025 graduate in AI & Machine Learning, proficient in Python, SQL, TensorFlow, and MediaPipe.
Skilled in OOP and SDLC. Seeking a backend/software developer role to contribute to innovative, data-driven applications.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Programming Languages: Python, SQL (Joins, Subqueries, Aggregations, Indexing)
AI / ML Libraries: MediaPipe, NumPy, Pandas, OpenCV, scikit-learn
Web Technologies: HTML, CSS
Frameworks: Django, REST API (Learning)
Databases: MySQL
Tools & Platforms: VS Code, Jupyter Notebook, Google Colab, Git, GitHub
Concepts: OOP, SDLC
Soft Skills: Team Collaboration, Problem Solving, Fast Learner, Technical Documentation (SRS)
PROJECTS
Sign Language to Text & Text-to-Voice Conversion | AI Developer
 Dec 2024 – Apr 2025
 Python | TensorFlow | Keras | MediaPipe | pyttsx3 | NumPy | Pandas
 Designed and trained a CNN-based ASL gesture recognition model achieving 82% accuracy in real-time classification.
 Integrated a text-to-speech (TTS) module using pyttsx3, enabling low-latency voice output for speech-impaired users.
 Preprocessed and augmented an ASL image dataset using NumPy and Pandas, improving training efficiency by 40% and
reducing overfitting.
 Built an end-to-end pipeline following OOP principles: webcam input → MediaPipe hand tracking → CNN classification →
speech output.
AI Career Assistant | Django Developer
 2025 – Present
 Python | Django | Gemini API | BeautifulSoup | MySQL | Gmail SMTP | HTML | CSS
 Built a full-stack Django web application with complete authentication system — register, login, logout, OTP email
verification, forgot password, password reset, and update profile using Gmail SMTP.
 Developed a Resume Analyzer module allowing PDF upload and AI-powered resume analysis using Google Gemini API
(gemini-2.0-flash-lite).
 Currently implementing a Job Automation Tracker to scrape live job listings from Internshala and Naukri using
BeautifulSoup.
 Designed using Django MVT architecture and OOP principles, following SDLC methodology from planning to deployment.
EDUCATION
B.E. – Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
Universal College of Engineering, Mumbai
 Graduated: 2025
CGPA: 7.0 / 10
 Diploma – Computer Engineering
Pravin Patil College of Engineering and Technology
 2019 – 2022
Percentage: 79%
 CERTIFICATIONS & AWARDS
 AWS Academy Graduate — AWS Academy Introduction to Cloud: Semester 1 | Issued: March 2024
 Advanced Course on Emerging Technologies — Machine Learning, IoT, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, SAP ABAP |
Code Unnati Program, 2023–2024 | Certificate ID: CU24 7120

2025 to till Date

Voucher, Journal & Banking transaction in “Tally ” Accounting Package.

 Filling the papers to the respective files and handling “Petty Cash ” of the Office.   
 Attending all office general works including attending phones.
